screen_metadata.name: Material Master Item Registry & Engineering Revision Vault

1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px dense part engineering vault catalog layout)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Three-Column Splitting Shell (Left Column Tracker Panel: Filterable categorized inventory item groups and assembly type indexes; Center Main Panel: High-density MaterialMaster parts data sheet list grid; Right Contextual Sidebar Drawer: Engineering Revision History Timeline, ECO [Engineering Change Order] control states, and CAD metadata attachment tables)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Renders simultaneous part classification tree stacks and engineering versioning history lines side-by-side cleanly)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The left group categorization tree collapses down into a sliding sidebar left drawer panel tracks to preserve multi-attribute text columns layout spacing)

key_visible_sections.title: Material Master Parts Tabular Asset Spreadsheet
Version Control & ECO Clearance Lifecycle Panel

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify active engineering or procurement validation keys -> Read global tenant multi-tenant boundary profiles -> Execute state request payload fetch from ProductManagementService.getMaterialMaster()
user_progression_routes.on_part_row_select: Asynchronously query database models to pull precise version timelines matching chosen record pointers keys to hydrate the right sidebar details sheet

redirection_rules.condition: If a material item part structure has an active or pending Engineering Change Order (ECO) hold flag status engaged
redirection_rules.action: Flash an immediate vivid amber hazard highlight border around context fields elements blocks and swap the downstream release action triggers buttons status text variables labels locally to 'Locked - ECO Under Review'

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User strikes action command selector link button 'btn_create_new_part'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop center dialog interactive wizard tracking step inputs forcing the definition of unique standard unit metrics, weight thresholds, chemical composition tags, and standard unit inventory cost metrics profiles

atoms.type: Tabular Numeric Precision Decimals Box Form Component

molecules.composition: Combines inventory group folder icon token + category title text string label + counted total subset part numeric items badge element
Combines version index tag alphanumeric label (e.g., Rev-B.4) + modifier engineer user id token + date timestamp log tracking label + text change order logs message field

organisms.composition: High-density tabular grid rendering master part specifications data records tracking properties: alphanumeric part numbers, titles, measurement unit codes, physical dimensions blocks, and standard base pricing columns fields.

Vertical tracking stack layout wrapping sequential instances blocks of revision_history_timeline_node elements rows lines, complete with interactive CAD attachment link blocks and ECO lock override authorization tools.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, sans-serif (Precision monospaced fonts stack used strictly on part numbers tags, dimensions labels, and revision tracking IDs to shield horizontal grid alignments layout balances)
